10/01/2023
840 RACE_NO_RSPNS_CD RACE_NO_RSPNS_CD A1010X Race: Resident unable to respond CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident is unable to respond to the question about their race. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes) effective 10/01/2023
841 RACE_DCLN_RSPNS_CD RACE_DCLN_RSPNS_CD A1010Y Race: Resident declines to respond CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident declined to respond to the question about their race. -=Not assessed/no
